description: Catalog of named report themes. Each entry is a machine-readable palette that mirrors the prose catalog in references/theme-colors.md. Themes are matched to layouts via layouts-index.json `recommended_themes[]`.

themes.name: Corporate / Financial
themes.personality: Dark, conservative — trust and authority

typography.notes: Editorial: serif titles for gravitas, humanist sans body

cvd_safety.note: Min perceptual distance (Lab deltaE) across normal + deuteranopia + protanopia + tritanopia. Ratings: safe>=15, caution 10-15, unsafe<10.

principles.proportion_rule: 60-30-10 — primary 60% of color weight on page, secondary 30%, accent 10%. Enforced per page, not per theme palette slot.
principles.data_ink_pattern: Monochromatic depth: primary series at 100% opacity, comparison series at 60%, highlight via accent color at 100%. Avoid rainbow assignment across series.
principles.focus_pattern: Focus-in-color: the data point the page is ABOUT takes the primary or accent color; everything else uses `neutrals.muted` / `neutrals.gridline`. Color is attention, not decoration.
